name: Reliable Pawn & Curio
description_short: Reliable Pawn & Curio is a pawn shop on Summer Ave in Memphis, TN, offering collateral-based loans and buying used goods with flexible payment options.
description_long:
Reliable Pawn & Curio operates as a pawn shop located at 3807 Summer Ave in Memphis, Tennessee, near the intersection of Isabelle St and Lynncrest St. The business has been listed in local business directories and maintains a physical storefront open Monday through Saturday. Like traditional pawn shops, Reliable Pawn & Curio provides collateral-based lending services where customers can secure short-term loans by pledging personal items of value.

The shop's primary offerings include pawn loans (using personal items as collateral), buying used goods outright, and various service options for customer convenience. They accept multiple forms of payment including Visa, MasterCard, Discover, and Debit Cards, making transactions accessible to a broad customer base. The store features in-store shopping, in-store pickup, and delivery options, suggesting they maintain an inventory of merchandise beyond pawn transactions.

Reliable Pawn & Curio distinguishes itself through customer-friendly amenities including wheelchair accessibility, a washroom, and Wi-Fi availability—features not universally offered at all pawn shops. Their extended Saturday hours (open until 4:30 PM) provide weekend access for working customers. The business has accumulated 172 visits to their CMac.ws listing, indicating local awareness and community engagement.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers needing immediate cash in exchange for collateral, though interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on their profile. Customers should understand that pawn loans involve the risk of losing pledged items if loans are not repaid, and they should verify current rates and terms directly with the shop before transacting. While pawn shops offer faster access to cash than traditional lenders, they are not suitable for those seeking unsecured credit or long-term financing solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Wheelchair accessible location makes the shop physically accessible to customers with mobility challenges
Extended Saturday hours (until 4:30 PM) accommodate working customers who cannot visit during weekday hours
Multiple payment methods accepted (Visa, MasterCard, Discover, Debit Cards) provide payment flexibility
Offers delivery service in addition to in-store pickup, providing convenience options for customers
In-store amenities including washroom and Wi-Fi improve the customer experience during visits
Buys used goods outright, offering customers an alternative to pawn loans if they prefer immediate sale
Established local presence with 172 documented visits indicating community trust and awareness
cons: No website or email contact information provided, limiting ability to get quotes or information remotely
Interest rates, loan terms, redemption periods, and fees are not disclosed on their profile
Pawn loans carry risk of losing collateral if unable to repay, creating financial downside for borrowers
Limited online presence makes it difficult to research the shop before visiting in person
Hours are limited (closed Sundays and evening hours), restricting access for some customers
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who have valuable personal items to use as collateral
People looking to sell used goods quickly without the time investment of online marketplaces
Memphis-area residents seeking a pawn shop with accessible facilities and weekend availability
Customers preferring in-person transactions with multiple payment and pickup options
diagnosis: Reliable Pawn & Curio is best suited for Memphis-area residents with valuable personal items who need immediate cash and prefer face-to-face transactions with accessible facilities. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral—failure to repay means losing the pledged item—and specific rates, terms, and fees are not publicly listed, requiring direct contact with the shop for pricing details before committing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
In-store shopping for pawned and consigned merchandise
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
